description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, metallic blade and a long, reinforced handle. The blade features two symmetrical, broad cutting edges with a slight curve and a central ridge, giving it a formidable appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or carved with a textured grip, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, reinforced with metal bands or fittings. The pommel at the end of the handle is rounded and metallic, providing balance and a secure grip. The axe has a weathered, utilitarian look, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty use rather than display. The overall color palette is dominated by dark metallic grays and browns, with hints of reddish or copper tones on the handle.
description: A double-headed battle axe with a broad, curved metallic blade and a long, textured wooden handle reinforced with metal bands. The axe has a rugged, utilitarian appearance with dark metallic and brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical double blades and the rounded pommel at the base of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and curvature of the blade, as well as the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the double blades and the detailed grip of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade's profile and the handle's reinforcement details.
attribute_handle_type: Long, cylindrical wooden handle with a textured or wrapped grip, reinforced with metal bands, straight with a rounded metallic pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, broad, curved steel blade with symmetrical edges and a central ridge, no beard, and a robust, functional design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and banded mounting with visible metal fittings securing the blade to the handle.
